channel.title: Cricket on Shivanand Velmurugan — Product leader. Systems thinker.
channel.description: Recent content in Cricket on Shivanand Velmurugan — Product leader. Systems thinker.

item.title: Awesome cricket ads
item.description:
Everything you need to know about cricket, in a series of awesome ads for Adidas.

and let’s see all of them mixed into one beautiful ad (that might make you want to watch this game, after all)
